scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,APP,BOT" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix discord-bot"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "API,APP,BOT" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix discord-bot"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix discord-bot
